title: Products
instruction_1: In this section you can manage the articles/products that will be published on the website.
instruction_2: Each product must belong to a category in order to be displayed to the public.
instruction_3: In addition, each product can contain the attributes that a category can offer.
instruction_4: You can manage all items by entering the corresponding category.
editor_cancel_title: Do you want to cancel the edition?
editor_save_title: Do you want to save this product?
editor_save_message: Make sure all the information is correct before continuing
editor_remove_title: Do you want to delete this product?
editor_remove_image: Do you want to delete this image?
editor_recove_image: Do you want to recover this image?
editor_remove_category: Do you want to delete this category?
editor_remove_attribute: Do you want to delete this attribute?
can_restore_later: You can get it back later
editor_disable_message: This will disable the product and it will not be visible to the public, but it will be saved in the database.
editor_delete_message: Once deleted, it cannot be recovered and any records related to this product will be lost.
editor_invalid_price: The product must have a price greater than 0
editor_invalid_name: The product must have a name
editor_invalid_variants: You must complete the product details fields
no_products_in_category: There are no articles in this category yet.
attribute_no_values: This attribute has no assigned values
variant_instruction_1: Here you can manage product variants.
variant_instruction_3: A variant is this same product but with assigned attributes/characteristics
variant_instruction_4: For example, if this product is a shirt, you can have several types of shirts that correspond to this same product
variant_instruction_5: Assuming the attribute/feature Size and Color exists, a Shirt can have a specific Size and Color assigned to it
variant_instruction_6: Therefore, a variant of a shirt is a white shirt of medium size
variant_instruction_7: Another variant could be a gray shirt, medium size
variant_instruction_8: Note that although it maintains the same size, the variation is different because the color changed
variant_instruction_9: In this way, you can make a product have several variations
variant_instruction_10: Each variant may have its own description, price, and stock, among other things
variant_instruction_11: If not defined, the one defined in the product will be used by default
image_error_3: Image set is too large to process
image_error_4: One of the images is too large to process
image_error_6: The maximum size of images allowed on the website was exceeded
